title: Proto session record (v1)
description: Proto-owned record of one run through a protocol (guided checklist). Written by `proto run <id>` as JSON for later consumption by RexOps / Workstate. One file per run; the protocol itself stays in YAML and is not part of this contract.
$comment: Modeled from proto/src/core/session.rs (Session, StepResult, StepStatus). JSON Schema cannot enforce that step_id values are unique or that finished_at is present iff every step is non-pending; producer contract tests in the Proto repo cover those invariants. Per suite contract rules, optional fields (finished_at, answered_at, note) are OMITTED when absent rather than written as null.

schema_version.description: Integer major version. Bumped only on a breaking change.

generated_at.description: When Proto last wrote this session file, as an RFC3339 timestamp.

protocol_id.description: Stable id of the protocol that was run (matches the protocol YAML's `id`).

protocol_title.description: Human-facing title of the protocol, copied in so the session is self-describing.

started_at.description: When the operator began the walkthrough, RFC3339.

finished_at.description: When every step had an outcome, RFC3339. OMITTED while the run is still in progress.

steps.description: One entry per protocol step, in the protocol's order.

step_id.description: The protocol step's id this outcome corresponds to (unique within a run).

status.description: Outcome of the step. `acknowledged` is used for info steps (no pass/fail); `pending` means not yet answered.

answered_at.description: When the operator answered this step, RFC3339. OMITTED while pending.

note.description: Optional free-text the operator attached to this step. OMITTED when empty.
